samples.xml_description:
<module id="pulse_detect">
    <description>Pulse Detection Module</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="clk">Clock signal.</input>
        <input id="rst_n">Reset signal (active low).</input>
        <input id="data_in">One-bit input signal.</input>
        <output id="data_out">Output signal indicating the presence of pulses.</output>
    </ports>
    <parameter_description>
        <state id="IDLE">Initial state.</state>
        <state id="STATE1">First state after detecting a pulse.</state>
        <state id="STATE2">Second state after detecting a pulse.</state>
        <state id="STATE3">Third state after detecting a pulse.</state>
    </parameter_description>
    <logic_description type="sequential_logic">
        <reg id="state">Register to hold the current state.</reg>
        <reg id="next_state">Next state for the state machine.</reg>
        <always @(posedge clk or negedge rst_n)>
            if (!rst_n) begin
                state <= IDLE;
                data_out <= 1'b0;
            end else begin
                state <= next_state;
            end
        </always>
        
        <always @(*) begin
            case(state)
                IDLE: begin
                    if(data_in == 1'b1) begin
                        next_state = STATE1;
                    end else begin
                        next_state = IDLE;
                    end
                end
                
                STATE1: begin
                    if(data_in == 1'b0) begin
                        next_state = STATE2;
                    end else begin
                        next_state = STATE1;
                    end
                end
                
                STATE2: begin
                    if(data_in == 1'b1) begin
                        next_state = STATE3;
                    end else begin
                        next_state = IDLE;
                    end
                end
                
                STATE3: begin
                    if(data_in == 1'b0) begin
                        next_state = IDLE;
                    end else begin
                        next_state = STATE1;
                    end
                end
                
                default: begin
                    next_state = IDLE;
                end
            endcase
            
            if(next_state == STATE3 && data_in == 1'b0) begin
                data_out = 1'b1;
            end else begin
                data_out = 1'b0;
            end
        end
    </logic_description>
    
    <implementation>Implements a simple pulse detection mechanism based on the input signal.</implementation>
</module>
